title: Select Spanish as the language
test_steps: Open the Phrasebook app. | Navigate to the language selection screen. | Tap on the 'Spanish' list row. | Verify that 'Spanish' is selected as the active language.
expected_result: Spanish is selected as the active language.

test_steps: Open the Phrasebook app. | Navigate to the language selection screen. | Tap on the 'German' list row. | Verify that 'German' is selected as the active language.
expected_result: German is selected as the active language.

title: Select multiple languages
test_steps: Open the Phrasebook app. | Navigate to the language selection screen. | Tap on the 'Spanish' list row. | Tap on the 'German' list row. | Tap on the 'French' list row. | Verify that 'Spanish', 'German', and 'French' are selected as the active languages.
expected_result: Spanish, German, and French are selected as the active languages.

title: Select a non-existent language
test_steps: Open the Phrasebook app. | Navigate to the language selection screen. | Tap on the 'Portuguese' list row. | Verify that 'Portuguese' is not selected as the active language.
expected_result: 'Portuguese' is not selected as the active language.

title: Select the same language multiple times
test_steps: Open the Phrasebook app. | Navigate to the language selection screen. | Tap on the 'Spanish' list row. | Tap on the 'Spanish' list row again. | Verify that 'Spanish' is selected as the active language.
expected_result: Spanish is selected as the active language.
